uiCompositionLayers.label: Design Tokens
uiCompositionLayers.rule: Palette, spacing, typography, radii, elevation. No feature/route/service/viewmodel logic.

uiCompositionLayers.label: Primitives
uiCompositionLayers.rule: Block + leaf atoms. No `style` prop. Every visual decision is a named token prop.

uiCompositionLayers.label: Panels
uiCompositionLayers.rule: Surface wrappers mapping semantic variants to Block paint. No feature imports.

uiCompositionLayers.label: Blocks
uiCompositionLayers.rule: App-agnostic composites of primitives + panels. No feature, router, or domain imports.

uiCompositionLayers.label: App-Shared UI
uiCompositionLayers.rule: App-shared components, scaffolds, theme overrides. No repository/store/router imports.

uiCompositionLayers.label: Feature UI
uiCompositionLayers.rule: Feature composition and behavior wiring. Maps viewmodel state to visual layers.

uiCompositionLayers.label: Routes
uiCompositionLayers.rule: Thin navigation wiring only. No visual styling or domain rendering.

mvvmLayers.label: View
mvvmLayers.rule: Dumb render only. Emits typed intents only. No service/API/storage imports.

mvvmLayers.label: ViewModel / Controller
mvvmLayers.rule: Owns UI state transitions. Calls use-cases only. No direct service/API imports.

mvvmLayers.label: UseCase
mvvmLayers.rule: One business action per use-case. Orchestrates repository methods. No UI imports.

mvvmLayers.label: Repository
mvvmLayers.rule: Stable feature data contract. Chooses datasource implementation(s). No view/viewmodel imports.

mvvmLayers.label: DataSource
mvvmLayers.rule: Transport/persistence details only. No feature UI imports.

mvvmLayers.label: Backend (proto contract → Kotlin routes)
mvvmLayers.rule: Cross-process boundary. Client depends on the proto contract, not server internals.

prohibitedEdges.reason: view -> service: must go through viewmodel -> usecase -> repository
view -> data layer: must go through viewmodel -> usecase
viewmodel -> service: must go through usecase -> repository
viewmodel -> data layer: must go through usecase
route -> service: routes must not import services directly

core.name: formatDisplayName
core.params: primary: string | undefined, fallback: string, separator = " — "
